scenarios.description: child(0) on element with no child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize()==0)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no childNodes

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with no child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize()==0)
child(0) on element with only non-element child nodes throws IndexOutOfBoundsException after filtering (no Element instances)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("text"));

scenarios.description: child(0) returns the single Element child (childNodeSize()>0, one element, index at lower bound)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the first child element with tagName "li"

scenarios.description: child(0) filters out non-elements and returns first Element when mixed nodes exist
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("x")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new Comment("c"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the span Element
pseudocode: parent.appendChild(new TextNode("x")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span")); parent.appendChild(new Comment("c"));

scenarios.description: child(1) returns second Element among multiple element children
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element e1 = new Element("p"); Element e2 = new Element("a"); parent.appendChild(e1); parent.appendChild(e2);
pseudocode: Element e1 = new Element("p"); Element e2 = new Element("a"); parent.appendChild(e1); parent.appendChild(e2);

scenarios.description: child(2) on element with two children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (index too large)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("p")); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (negative index)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));

scenarios.description: child(0) builds element list with caching reference set to non-null after first call
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element e = new Element("img"); parent.appendChild(e); // cache empty
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is e; shadowChildrenRef is non-null after call
pseudocode: assert result == e; assert parent.childElementsList() != Collections.emptyList();

scenarios.description: child(1) after adding new element invalidates previous empty cache and returns new element
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("p")); parent.childElementsList(); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is span Element; cache refreshed to include two elements
pseudocode: Element p = new Element("p"); parent.appendChild(p); parent.childElementsList();
